# Case 1 — Regression: TransLine Logistics

**Client:** TransLine Logistics, a regional transport operator.

**The ask:** "Our shipments keep arriving late and we don't know why. Can you help us figure out how late a shipment will be, and what actually drives that?"

**Data format:** CSV (`data/transport_delays.csv`), generated by `data/generate.py`.

**What you'll build across this case:** a regression model that estimates shipment delay in minutes from information known at dispatch time, plus a decision note explaining which factors actually matter and what TransLine should do about them.

Lessons in this case live under `lessons/`, numbered in the order you should work through them.
